name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)

evidence.claim: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source provide a web API framework supporting GraphQL, REST, and SOAP.
Adobe Commerce REST API supports OAuth 1.0a and token-based authentication.
Search citation: What is Adobe Commerce (Formerly Magento)? Comprehensive Guide for 2025 | Rightpoint
Search citation: Adobe Commerce (Magento): B2B & B2C Enterprise Solutions | Adobe

one_liner: Adobe Commerce (formerly Magento) is a flexible, enterprise-grade eCommerce platform that enables businesses to build personalized, scalable, and headless shopping experiences.
access_notes: Developers can enable web services through the Adobe Commerce Admin panel by creating an integration, which allows for self-managed API credentials without requiring a paid plan or external approval.
auth_notes: Adobe Commerce supports OAuth 1.0a for third-party applications, token-based authentication for mobile/server-to-server, and login credentials for admin/customer sessions. Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service requires Adobe Identity Management Service (IMS) using Bearer tokens.
api_notes: The platform provides a comprehensive web API framework supporting REST, GraphQL, and SOAP to manage core commerce objects like products, orders, and customers. REST endpoints vary between on-premises/Cloud versions and Cloud Service (SaaS). SOAP is supported but less commonly used in modern integrations compared to REST and GraphQL.
mcp_notes: Adobe Commerce documentation mentions built-in support for agentic commerce protocols and an MCP layer to power custom agentic experiences.
